humanRationale: URL belongs to netflix.com and title is non-empty and brand-relevant.
criteria:
You are evaluating whether a browser landing page loaded correctly.

PASS if BOTH conditions are met:
  1. The URL hostname contains the expected domain (netflix.com). Subpaths, country variants (/in, /browse, /title/...) are fine.
  2. The page title is non-empty and reasonably related to the site.

FAIL if ANY condition is violated:
  - URL hostname does not contain the expected domain.
  - Title is empty or completely unrelated to the site.
context: Browser smoke validation — landing page quality check. We are verifying the page loaded on the correct domain with a valid title.

result.rationale: URL is on netflix.com and title says Netflix — both conditions met.
result.label: PASS

result.rationale: URL is google.com, not the expected netflix.com domain.
result.label: FAIL
